description: CompositionReversible Basketball shorts in black and white, made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring and a mesh outer Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash warm with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry on low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Built for breathable comfort and with the zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike basketball shorts for boys comes in a simple design . These high-performance shorts created from Dri-Fit fabric wick sweat away from the body and keeps you cool, dry and comfortable. Team them with tees and basketball shoes.
